# Middleware validation for routes in superadmin.js (2026-03-10 11:23Z)

_**User**_

In the file `d:\web development\test\server\routes\superadmin.js`, add the `validate()` middleware to each of these POST/PUT routes. The `validate` function and all schemas are already imported at the top of the file.

Use the StrReplace tool for each change. For each route, ONLY change the route handler signature to add `validate(schemaName),` before `async (req, res)`. Do NOT change any other code.

Here are the exact replacements needed:

1. Line ~144: `router.post('/users', async (req, res) => {` → `router.post('/users', validate(createUserSchema), async (req, res) => {`

2. Line ~447: `router.post('/tenants', async (req, res) => {` → `router.post('/tenants', validate(createTenantSchema), async (req, res) => {`

3. Line ~582: `router.post('/sip-extensions', async (req, res) => {` → `router.post('/sip-extensions', validate(createSipExtensionSchema), async (req, res) => {`

4. Line ~734: `router.post('/sip-trunks', async (req, res) => {` → `router.post('/sip-trunks', validate(createSipTrunkSchema), async (req, res) => {`

5. Line ~912: `router.post('/campaigns', async (req, res) => {` → `router.post('/campaigns', validate(createCampaignSchema), async (req, res) => {`

6. Line ~1016: `router.post('/inbound-routes', async (req, res) => {` → `router.post('/inbound-routes', validate(createInboundRouteSchema), async (req, res) => {`

7. Line ~1123: `router.put('/outbound-routes', async (req, res) => {` → `router.put('/outbound-routes', validate(outboundRouteSchema), async (req, res) => {`

8. Line ~1173: `router.post('/queues', async (req, res) => {` → `router.post('/queues', validate(createQueueSchema), async (req, res) => {`

9. Line ~1297: `router.post('/queues/:id/members', async (req, res) => {` → `router.post('/queues/:id/members', validate(addQueueMemberSchema), async (req, res) => {`

10. Line ~1374: `router.post('/ivr-menus', async (req, res) => {` → `router.post('/ivr-menus', validate(createIvrMenuSchema), async (req, res) => {`

11. Line ~1512: `router.post('/time-groups', async (req, res) => {` → `router.post('/time-groups', validate(createTimeGroupSchema), async (req, res) => {`

12. Line ~1586: `router.post('/time-conditions', async (req, res) => {` → `router.post('/time-conditions', validate(createTimeConditionSchema), async (req, res) => {`

13. Line ~1680: `router.post('/sound-files', async (req, res) => {` → `router.post('/sound-files', validate(createSoundFileSchema), async (req, res) => {`

14. Line ~1744: `router.post('/voicemail-boxes', async (req, res) => {` → `router.post('/voicemail-boxes', validate(createVoicemailBoxSchema), async (req, res) => {`

15. Line ~1989: `router.post('/live-agents/:agentId/monitor', requireSuperadmin, async (req, res) => {` → `router.post('/live-agents/:agentId/monitor', requireSuperadmin, validate(monitorSchema), async (req, res) => {`

16. Line ~2435: `router.put('/role-modules', async (req, res) => {` → `router.put('/role-modules', validate(roleModuleSchema), async (req, res) => {`

Do each replacement one by one with StrReplace. Do NOT skip any.

---

_**Agent (model composer-1.5, mode Agent)**_
